-r requirements_base.txt

# CUDA 13.2 / torch 2.11+cu130 / triton 3.6.0 dep set.
# First-version scope: torch + torchvision + triton + deep_gemm + flash_mla
# + tilelang + fast_safetensors + fastsafetensors (the last two rebuilt against
# torch 2.11+cu130 and mirrored to oss://rtp-maga/0502/).  Other
# torch-ABI-bound wheels (flash_attn, flashinfer, deep_ep, rtp_kernel,
# fast_hadamard, nvidia_cutlass_dsl) are deferred — see plan
# §K and bazel/arch_select.bzl whl_deps() cuda13_x86 branch for how
# rtp_llm/BUILD selects subset out of that set.

# Core torch stack — wheels mirrored to OSS by us; upstream is
# https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu130/.
https://rtp-maga.oss-cn-zhangjiakou.aliyuncs.com/miji/0430/torch-2.11.0%2Bcu130-cp310-cp310-manylinux_2_28_x86_64.whl
https://rtp-maga.oss-cn-zhangjiakou.aliyuncs.com/miji/0430/torchvision-0.26.0%2Bcu130-cp310-cp310-manylinux_2_28_x86_64.whl

# Triton 3.6.0 supports CUDA 13.x ptxas natively (no wrapper needed).
triton==3.6.0

# Self-built wheels (built from GitHub deepseek-ai/{DeepGEMM,FlashMLA} main
# against torch 2.11+cu130 with gcc-toolset-12; SHAs encoded in filename).
http://rtp-maga.oss-cn-zhangjiakou.aliyuncs.com/rtp_llm/deep_gemm/cuda13_b200/deep_gemm-2.5.0%2B8a4dfba-cp310-cp310-linux_x86_64.whl
https://rtp-maga.oss-cn-zhangjiakou.aliyuncs.com/miji/0430/flash_mla-1.0.0%2B9241ae3-cp310-cp310-linux_x86_64.whl

# DSV4 mHC uses TileLang by default.  Keep the same version as cuda12_9.
tilelang==0.1.9

# Freeze/resume sleep-mode weight offload backend.  The wheel carries the
# torch_memory_saver Python package plus CUDA 12/13 preload and pluggable
# allocator native extensions.
torch_memory_saver==0.0.9.post1

# rtp_kernel built against torch 2.11+cu130 for cuda13.
http://rtp-maga.oss-cn-zhangjiakou.aliyuncs.com/serina.wzq/whl/06_11/rtp_kernel-0.1.0-cp310-cp310-linux_x86_64.whl

# fastsafetensors / fast_safetensors rebuilt against torch 2.11+cu130
# (originals were torch 2.1.2 + cu121).  Project name is `fast-safetensors`
# on PyPI but the import is `fast_safetensors`; both wheels installed.
# Required by --load_method fastsafetensors smoke targets.
https://rtp-maga.oss-cn-zhangjiakou.aliyuncs.com/0507/fast_safetensors-0.7.3%2Btorch2.11.cu130-cp310-cp310-linux_x86_64.whl
https://rtp-maga.oss-cn-zhangjiakou.aliyuncs.com/0502/fastsafetensors-0.1.20%2Bali-cp310-cp310-linux_x86_64.whl
# fast_safetensors rebuilt against torch 2.11+cu130.

# Pin safetensors and tabulate for parity with cu12_9 lock.
safetensors==0.7.0
mysql-connector-python
tabulate==0.9.0

# autoawq / auto_gptq / bitsandbytes / peft are torch-ABI-bound; pip will
# resolve compatible versions if available, otherwise we'll see them in
# the lock.  Drop autoawq from cuda13 (no torch 2.11 wheel yet upstream)
# and autoawq-kernels (same).
# auto_gptq      # deferred — torch 2.11 ABI rebuild needed
# autoawq        # deferred
# tensorrt 10.x cu12 series — drop for cuda13 (use TRT-LLM plugins via C++ side).
